source_document.document_identity_notes: Regulator-source PDF downloaded from Wisconsin DFI. Filing ID 639085. Trade name 'Mosquito Authority' confirmed on detail page. Cover page confirms Main Line Brands LLC / Mosquito Authority 2025 FDD. Document dated May 2, 2025.

brand.parent_company: Main Line Brands Holdings LLC / Susquehanna Private Capital Fund II, LLP

initial_franchise_fee.notes: Fee varies by franchise type: Full-Size Franchise $45,000 (approx. 35,000 single-family dwellings territory), Hometown Franchise $25,000 (smaller territory). 30% discount on 2nd+ concurrent agreement. Veterans discount 15%. Nonrefundable once paid. Franchisor may defer up to 50% of fee (36-month promissory note at 8% annual interest). During 2024 fiscal year, some franchises sold at reduced fees of $31,500 and $35,000.

provenance.exact_text: The Initial Franchise Fee for a Full-Size Franchise is $45,000...The Initial Franchise Fee for a Hometown Franchise is $25,000.

royalty_rate.notes: 10% of Gross Revenues or minimum monthly fee (whichever greater). Minimum starts at $0 in year 1, $200 in year 2, increasing by $100/year to $700 in year 7+. Payable by ACH/EFT on 1st of each month. Gross Revenues = all revenue from sales including cash, check, credit card. Excludes sales/use/service taxes.

provenance.item_reference: Item 6, Monthly Fee row and Note 1
provenance.exact_text: 10% of Gross Revenues, or a minimum monthly fees starting in year two of $200 and then increasing by $100 each year of operations up to $700, whichever is greater

advertising_and_marketing.structure_description: No single ad fund rate. National Marketing Fee not yet implemented (reserved at up to 3% of Gross Revenues). Minimum Individual Local Advertising Expense is greater of $5,500 or 5% of Gross Sales annually. Special Campaigns may require additional contributions credited against local ad minimum.

components.name: National Marketing Fee
components.notes: Not yet implemented as of 2025 FDD. If implemented, up to 3% of Gross Revenues with minimum monthly fee ranging $150-$200. Franchisor reserves right to implement on written notice.

components.name: Minimum Individual Local Advertising Expense
components.notes: Greater of $5,500 or 5% of Gross Sales annually. Must be spent with approved marketing vendors or franchisor. All marketing must be approved before use. Includes pay per click and social media advertising.

components.name: Special Campaigns Participation Fees
components.notes: Amount set by franchisor based on campaign nature. Credited toward Minimum Individual Local Advertising Expense.

advertising_and_marketing.notes: National Marketing Fee not yet implemented but reserved. Local ad minimum is the only currently active marketing obligation.

provenance.item_reference: Item 6, National Marketing Fee row, Minimum Individual Local Advertising row, Special Campaigns row, Notes 4 and 13

technology_fee.notes: Monthly fee ranges from $100 to $1,200 depending on Gross Revenues in prior 12-month period. Tiered: $0-$50K=$100, $50K-$150K=$200, $150K-$250K=$300, $250K-$350K=$400, $350K-$450K=$500, $450K-$550K=$600, $550K-$650K=$700, $650K-$750K=$800, $750K-$850K=$900, $850K-$950K=$1,000, $950K-$1.05M=$1,100, $1.05M+=$1,200. Includes required Dispatch Plus and/or Field Routes Software.

provenance.item_reference: Item 6, Technology and Software Systems Fee row, Note 10
provenance.exact_text: A monthly fee ranging from $100 to $1,200 depending on your Gross Revenues

transfer_fee.notes: $7,500 if transferee has no existing relationship with franchisor (for Mosquito Authority, Pest Authority, or FMT). $2,500 if transferee has existing relationship. Due upon signing then-current successor Franchise Agreement.

provenance.exact_text: $7,500 U.S. if the transferee does not have any existing relationship with us...or $2,500 U.S. if the transferee has an existing relationship with us

other_fees.notes: Currently $250/month. May increase. Includes local website pages, SEO, social media reputation management, local search web form, organic leads, review generation tools.
Currently none. Franchisor may implement and increase upon notice. Would cover social media posts and review response for Google, Facebook, Yelp.
$750-$1,250 per day plus travel expenses, lodging and meals. Payable 30 days after billing.

provenance.exact_text: $750 - $1,250 per day plus travel expenses, lodging and meals

other_fees.notes: $500-$5,000 plus expenses estimated at $50. If you fail to attend conference, charged greater of $699 or that year's cost to attend. Mandatory meetings at franchisor's discretion.
Applies to all overdue fees, reports, documents, records or statements.
Due upon signing then-current successor Franchise Agreement.

line_items.category: Pre-Opening and First Year Marketing Package
line_items.notes: Branded items, marketing materials, pre-opening marketing, continuing assistance during first year. May be reduced if existing franchises near market.
Training at Charlotte, NC or designated location. Initial training included in franchise fee for up to 5 people.

line_items.category: Storage Facility for inventory and equipment
line_items.notes: Zero if own adequate storage. Local law may require commercial location.
Must be late model, mechanically sound, white, full-size pickup truck. Zero if already own qualifying vehicle. Lease approx $500 deposit + monthly payments. Purchase $12,500-$30,000.

line_items.when_due: Earlier of 120 days after signing or within 30 days after initial training
line_items.notes: Magnetic signage initially, then full vehicle outfitting after 90 days in service.

line_items.method_of_payment: As agreed to with insurance agent
line_items.notes: Costs vary by size of business, prior claims, and state.

line_items.category: Additional Funds for first three months of operation
line_items.notes: Operating expenses estimate for first 3 months, not including revenue. Does not include owner salary/draw or taxes.

tables.description: Full profit & loss statement for company-owned single territory in Hickory, NC (in operation since 2009)
tables.notes: Single company-owned location. Royalty fees at 10%. Advertising ~10% of gross revenue. Technology fee $7,000/year. Call center fees of $13,919.75 based on beta program (2024). Manager salary $48,000/year. Net income is negative both years after depreciation and $60K annual amortization. Excludes second company-owned location in West Chester, PA (acquired 2023, sold 2024).

tables.description: Franchised Business Gross Revenue distribution by revenue bracket for 2024
tables.population: 128 franchisees operating 506 franchised Businesses in continual operation for entire 2023 and 2024 calendar years (out of 154 franchisees owning 546 total Businesses as of Dec 31, 2024)

data.note: Table totals show 129/508 which differs slightly from stated population of 128/506. Reproduced as printed in FDD.

tables.notes: Average Gross Revenue of $464,599.95 for the 128 qualifying franchisees. 27% of franchisees (34) exceeded $500K. 46% of territories (247) are held by franchisees earning $500K+.

provenance.item_reference: Item 19, Part 2, Gross Revenue by Franchisee
provenance.exact_text: The average Gross Revenue of the 128 franchisees that operated 506 franchised Businesses during the 2024 fiscal year was $464,599.95.

tables.table_label: Part 2 - Gross Revenue by Territories Owned
tables.description: Revenue distribution by number of territories owned per franchisee

provenance.item_reference: Item 19, Part 2, Gross Revenue by Number of Territories

tables.table_label: Part 2 - Gross Revenue by Length of Ownership
tables.description: Revenue distribution by years franchisee has owned franchise

provenance.item_reference: Item 19, Part 2, Gross Revenue by Length of Time

tables.table_label: Part 2 - Gross Revenue by Years Active
tables.description: Revenue statistics by number of full seasons active
tables.notes: 10+ Full Seasons average shows '#REF!' in the FDD — appears to be a spreadsheet formula error in the source document. Recorded as null. This is a data quality issue in the filed document itself.

provenance.item_reference: Item 19, Part 2, Gross Revenues by Number of Years Active

item_19_financial_performance.notes: Item 19 disclosed in two parts: Part 1 is a full P&L for 1 company-owned location (Hickory, NC, since 2009). Part 2 is franchised business gross revenue distributions for 128 qualifying franchisees (506 territories) in continual operation for full 2023 and 2024. Part 2 includes revenue brackets, territory counts, ownership length, and years-active cohorts. Notable: Part 1 shows negative net income for the company-owned location in both 2023 and 2024 (after $60K annual amortization). Part 2 shows average gross revenue of $464,600 across qualifying franchisees. A '#REF!' spreadsheet error appears in the 10+ Full Seasons average cell.

years_reported.notes: Franchised: 524 start, 529 end. 7 opened, 0 terminated, 0 non-renewals, 0 reacquired, 2 ceased. Company-owned: 0 start, 1 end (acquired Hickory NC location Feb 2022). Each Territory counted as one Outlet. 62 Hometown Franchises as of end of 2024 fiscal year.

Franchised: 529 start, 539 end. 14 opened, 0 terminated, 0 non-renewals, 3 reacquired, 7 ceased. Company-owned: 1 start, 2 end (added West Chester PA). Reacquired territories may be unrealized or largely inactive territories from multi-territory franchisees.

Franchised: 539 start, 546 end. 18 opened, 0 terminated, 3 non-renewals, 1 reacquired, 7 ceased. Company-owned: 2 start, 1 end (sold West Chester PA back to franchisee). First non-renewals in the 3-year period.

item_3_litigation.notes: No pending litigation. 5 concluded actions disclosed, all involving predecessor entity TMA Franchise Systems, Inc. (not current franchisor Main Line Brands LLC). Actions were state regulatory matters: Maryland (2013, Consent Order for selling without registration), Rhode Island (2013, Consent Agreement for selling without registration, $5,000 penalty), Virginia (2015, Settlement Order for selling without registration, $20,000 penalty), Wisconsin (2016, Consent Order for selling without registration, $10,000 penalty), Washington (2020, Assurance of Discontinuance regarding Soccer Shots compliance, inherited via corporate relationship). All actions related to pre-2020 predecessor operations under TMA.

provenance.exact_text: Other than these 5 actions, no litigation is required to be disclosed in this Item.

provenance.item_reference: Item 1 and WI DFI filing detail page (States Also Filed In field)
provenance.exact_text: We began offering franchises for Mosquito, Tick, Fly and Spotted Lantern Fly Control Specialty Businesses in October 2020.

warnings: Initial franchise fee varies by franchise type (Full-Size $45,000 vs Hometown $25,000). Recorded as range, not single value.
Advertising/marketing recorded with field_status 'ambiguous': National Marketing Fee not yet implemented (reserved up to 3%), local ad minimum is greater of $5,500 or 5%. No single rate possible.
Technology fee recorded with field_status 'ambiguous': tiered from $100 to $1,200/month based on trailing 12-month Gross Revenue.
Total ongoing fee rate is null because advertising/marketing and technology fee cannot be expressed as single percentages.
Item 19 Part 2, 'At Least 10+ Full Seasons' row shows '#REF!' for average revenue — appears to be a spreadsheet formula error in the filed FDD. Recorded as null.
Item 19 Part 2 table totals (129 franchisees / 508 territories) differ slightly from stated population (128 / 506). Reproduced as printed.
Item 3: No pending litigation against current franchisor. 5 concluded actions all involve predecessor TMA (pre-2020). Classified as has_litigation=false because no actions involve current entity.

year_company_founded and year_first_franchised set to 2009 based on predecessor original TMA offering franchises from October 2009. Current entity (Main Line Brands LLC) formed September 2020. Both dates sourced from Item 1.

States registered list includes Wisconsin (filing state) plus 12 states from WI DFI detail page 'States Also Filed In' field. California is listed there but CA DFPI registration has not been independently verified via the CA search portal.

Net unit growth uses Table 1 franchised net change directly (+5, +10, +7) rather than computing from Table 3 columns, because Table 3 totals do not perfectly reconcile with Table 1. The FDD notes that reacquired territories from multi-territory franchisees may be reassigned without appearing as new openings in Table 3.
Turnover rate includes terminations + non_renewals + reacquired + ceased + transfers in numerator. Transfers represent ownership changes (outlet stays open) but are included as a churn signal.

null_fields.reason: Fee varies by franchise type: $25,000 (Hometown) or $45,000 (Full-Size). Recorded as range.
National Marketing Fee not yet implemented. Local ad minimum is $5,500 or 5%. No single percentage rate.
Tiered from $100 to $1,200/month based on trailing 12-month Gross Revenue. No single value.
Cannot compute because advertising/marketing and technology fee are ambiguous.
